productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women Blue Wallet
description: Style Note Worry no more about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from United Colours of Benetton. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Product Details Sea blue wallet with a press buttoned flap closure Five card holder slots on the flap One main compartment and a zippered pocket with a seperator Material and Care 100% polyurethane Wipe with clean, dry cloth to remove dirt Size Height: 11.5 cm Width: 13.5 cm Depth: 3.5 cm
